## What happened

A clear, concise description of the bug.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Cloned the repo / ran `/setup` / ...
2. ...

- Agent: Claude Code / OpenAI Codex / Cursor / other
- OS: macOS / Linux / Windows

## Affected file(s)

List the file(s) where the bug lives, if known.

## Additional context

Paste any relevant agent output, error messages, or screenshots here.
